title: Infosys launches AI-first GCC Model for Global Capability Centers
detailed_summary: Infosys unveiled its AI-First GCC Model, a specialized offering intended to accelerate the setup and transformation of Global Capability Centers into AI-powered innovation hubs. The offering combines Infosys Agentic Foundry, EdgeVerve AI Next, and Infosys Topaz to embed production-grade agentic AI across GCC operations. Infosys said the model builds on over 100 engagements with local GCC entities across industries, including work with Lufthansa Systems, zooplus, and Danske Bank, and supports GCC lifecycle needs including setup, talent strategy, operational readiness, and operating models such as Build-Operate-Transfer, assisted GCC builds, joint ventures, and partner-hosted models.
